sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT e1.user_pseudo_id) AS distinct_users_with_positive_engagement
FROM bigquery-public-data.ga4_obfuscated_sample_ecommerce.events_20210109 e1
LEFT JOIN bigquery-public-data.ga4_obfuscated_sample_ecommerce.events_20201107 e2
ON e1.user_pseudo_id = e2.user_pseudo_id
WHERE e1.event_timestamp >= UNIX_SECONDS('2021-01-01 00:00:00')
AND e1.event_timestamp < UNIX_SECONDS('2021-01-08 00:00:00')
AND e2.event_timestamp IS NULL;

SELECT SUM(hits.product.productRevenue) AS total_revenue, hits.product.v2ProductName, hits.product.productRevenue
FROM `bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_20170710`
WHERE (hits.product.v2ProductName = 'Youtube Men’s Vintage Henley') AND (hits.product.v2ProductName != 'Youtube Men’s Vintage Henley') AND (DATE('2017-07-01') <= DATE(hits.time) AND DATE(hits.time) <= DATE('2017-07-31'))
GROUP BY hits.product.v2ProductName
ORDER BY SUM(hits.product.productRevenue) DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT SUM(totals.transactionRevenue) AS total_transaction_revenue, totals.transactionRevenue
FROM `bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_20170127`
WHERE (YEAR(date) = 2017)
GROUP BY date
ORDER BY SUM(totals.transactionRevenue) DESC

SELECT DATE_DIFF(MIN(CAST(date AS DATE)), MIN(CAST(date AS DATE)), DAY) AS days_elapsed, totals.visits, totals.transactions, totals.transactionRevenue
FROM `bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_20170201`
WHERE (totals.transactions > 0) AND (date BETWEEN '2017-02-01' AND '2017-02-28')
GROUP BY fullVisitorId

SELECT SUM(hits.product.productRevenue) AS total_product_revenue, MAX(SUM(hits.product.productRevenue)) OVER (PARTITION BY DATE(hits.time)) AS max_daily_revenue, MAX(SUM(hits.product.productRevenue)) OVER (PARTITION BY EXTRACT(WEEK FROM DATE(hits.time))) AS max_weekly_revenue, MAX(SUM(hits.product.productRevenue)) OVER (PARTITION BY EXTRACT(MONTH FROM DATE(hits.time))) AS max_monthly_revenue, hits.product, hits.page.pagePath, hits.page.pageTitle, hits.page.searchKeyword, hits.page.searchCategory, hits.page.pagePathLevel1, hits.page.pagePathLevel2, hits.page.pagePathLevel3, hits.page.pagePathLevel4, hits.transaction, hits.item, hits.contentInfo, hits.appInfo, hits.exceptionInfo, hits.eventInfo, hits.promotion, hits.promotionActionInfo, hits.refund, hits.eCommerceAction, hits.experiment, hits.publisher, hits.customVariables, hits.customDimensions, hits.customMetrics, hits.type, hits.social, hits.latencyTracking, hits.sourcePropertyInfo, hits.contentGroup, hits.dataSource, hits.publisher_infos
FROM `bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions.ga_sessions_20170710`
WHERE (DATE(hits.time) BETWEEN '2017-01-01' AND '2017-06-30') AND (DATE(hits.time) BETWEEN '2017-01-01' AND '2017-06-30')
GROUP BY hits.page.pagePath, hits.page.pageTitle, hits.page.searchKeyword, hits.page.searchCategory, hits.page.pagePathLevel1, hits.page.pagePathLevel2, hits.page.pagePathLevel3, hits.page.pagePathLevel4
ORDER BY SUM(hits.product.productRevenue) DESC

SELECT AVG(totals.pageviews) AS avg_pageviews_per_visitor, totals.hits, totals.pageviews, totals.transactions, totals.transactionRevenue
FROM `bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_20170127`
WHERE (totals.transactions >= 1 AND totals.transactionRevenue IS NOT NULL) AND (totals.transactions IS NULL AND totals.transactionRevenue IS NULL) AND (DATE('2017-04-01') <= DATE('2017-07-31'))
GROUP BY CASE WHEN totals.transactions >= 1 AND totals.transactionRevenue IS NOT NULL THEN 'purchase' ELSE 'non-purchase' END, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM DATE('2017-01-27'))
ORDER BY EXTRACT(MONTH FROM DATE('2017-01-27')) ASC

SELECT SUM(hits.product.productQuantity) AS total_quantity, hits.product, hits.page.pagePath
FROM `bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions.ga_sessions_20170701`
WHERE (hits.page.pagePath LIKE '%youtube%' OR hits.page.pagePath LIKE '%YouTube%') AND (hits.product IS NOT NULL AND ARRAY_LENGTH(hits.product) > 0) AND (LOWER(hits.product.v2ProductName) NOT LIKE '%youtube%') AND (DATE('2017-07-01') <= DATE(hits.time) AND DATE(hits.time) <= DATE('2017-07-31'))
GROUP BY hits.product.v2ProductName
ORDER BY SUM(hits.product.productQuantity) DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT hits.page.pagePath AS next_page, MAX(hits.time) AS max_time_on_home, hits.page.pagePath, hits.time, hits.page.pagePathLevel1, hits.page.pagePathLevel2, hits.page.pagePathLevel3, hits.page.pagePathLevel4
FROM `bq.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_20170127`
WHERE (hits.page.pagePath LIKE '/home%' AND hits.page.pagePath IS NOT NULL)
GROUP BY hits.page.pagePath
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT SUM(pageviews) AS pageviews, visitorId
FROM `bq.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_20170127`
WHERE (pageviews IS NOT NULL) AND (DATE('2017-06-01') <= date AND date <= DATE('2017-07-31'))
GROUP BY month, classification
ORDER BY month ASC

SELECT MAX(DATE('2017-01-27') - DATE('2016-09-16')) AS max_days_diff, device.isMobile
FROM `bq.ga360.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_20170127`
WHERE (device.isMobile = TRUE) AND (DATE('2017-01-27')) AND (DATE('2016-09-16'))
